5g-5gophers-walking-loop.description: Public 5G pedestrian walking-loop trace replay from UMN 5Gophers.

5g-ucc-driving-bursty-high.description: UCC public 5G driving trace selected for high burst ceiling and sharp rate variation.

5g-ucc-driving-congested.description: UCC public 5G adverse driving window selected by lowest median downlink, with outage and loss dynamics.

5g-ucc-driving-good.description: UCC public 5G driving good download trace, selecting the highest-median downlink window with mobility dynamics.

5g-ucc-driving-handover-heavy.description: UCC public 5G driving trace selected for frequent cell changes and handover outage dynamics.

5g-ucc-driving-replay.description: UCC public 5G driving download trace replay with per-step rate, latency, jitter, loss, queue dynamics, and cell-change outage events.

5g-ucc-static-good.description: UCC public 5G static good download trace, selecting the highest-median downlink window with per-step cellular dynamics.

5g-ucc-static-replay.description: UCC public 5G static download trace replay with per-step rate, latency, jitter, loss, and queue dynamics.

5g-ucc-video-app-shaped.description: UCC public 5G Netflix driving trace preserving app-shaped video buffering and idle periods; not a pure access-capacity profile.

lte-ucc-car-replay.description: UCC public 4G LTE car mobility trace with frequent cell changes and rate variation.

lte-ucc-congested.description: UCC public 4G LTE adverse pedestrian window selected by lowest median downlink as a congested LTE profile.

lte-ucc-pedestrian-replay.description: UCC public 4G LTE pedestrian mobility trace with per-step rate and cell-change dynamics.

lte-ucc-static-good.description: UCC public 4G LTE static good trace, selecting the highest-median downlink window.

lte-ucc-train-adverse.description: UCC public 4G LTE train trace selected for adverse high-speed mobility, long low-throughput periods, and heavy handover dynamics.

lte-ucc-tram-handover.description: UCC public 4G LTE public-transit bus trace used as the tram-like handover profile because the archive exposes bus rather than tram traces.
